hooks.command:
python -c "
import sys, json, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
    pattern = r'git (commit|push|reset|rebase|clean|branch -[dD])|rm -[rf]+\\b|rmdir|deploy|DROP |DELETE FROM'
    if re.search(pattern, cmd, re.IGNORECASE):
        print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'permissionDecision': 'ask', 'permissionDecisionReason': f'High-impact action detected: {cmd}'}}))
except Exception:
    pass
"
